me in Tokyo


Jun 2023

Bruno Koga


Hi 👋, I’m Bruno! Born and raised in Brazil, currently living a nomadic lifestyle.

After almost 15 years dedicating my professional life to develop iOS apps, I decided to change the focus of my career a little bit and today I work as an Engineering Manager at Doctolib Siilo.

Not long ago I discovered my passion for sports. I love to hike (so much so that in 2024 I’m going to thru-hike the PCT), and I love even more to snowboard. If that’s your thing, this is my Strava profile.

If you want to know more about me you can check out my LinkedIn and Github pages. I also highlighted some of my favorite projects here.
